svg.title: ISP Web Application Architecture
svg.desc: Three-tier architecture: Frontend (HTML/CSS/JS), Backend (PHP), and Database (MySQL) with core feature modules

g.text: Customer portal · Admin dashboard · Responsive UI
Authentication · Business logic · API routing · Session management
Users · Packages · Invoices · Payments · Tickets · Logs
